case_title: CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. SYLVIA E GUZMAN

docket_entries.description: PROSPECT LIMITATIONS ON ZSFG'S RIGHT TO RECOVER BALANCE OF BILLS CCSF V. SYLVIA E. GUZMAN (ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $92.00 SERVED OCT-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, SYLVIA E
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER.. DEFENDANT SYLVIA E. GUZMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FROM JAN-24-2019 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JAN-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
ORDER RE: ADVANCE OF COURT DATE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAR-11-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN REQUESTS THE PLAINTIFF, THE TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE, SHALL FILE A STATEMENT ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 19, 2019, CONCERNING WHY IT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER THE BALANCE OF ITS BILL FROM THE DEFENDANT NOTWITHSTANDING THE PROSPECT MEDICAL GROUP HOLDING AND THE CONCERNS THE COURT HAS RAISED HERE. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE STATEMENTS BY REGULAR MAIL OR OVERNIGHT MAIL ON THE DEFENDANTS IN EACH CASE. PLAINTIFF SHALL INCLUDE A PROOF OF SERVICE IN ITS FILING. DEFENDANT SYLVIA E. GUZMAN MAY BUT IS NOT REQUIRED TO FILE RESPONDING STATEMENTS ON OR BEFORE MARCH 11, 2019. DEFENDANT MUST SERVE ANY STATEMENTS ON PLAINTIFF BY REGULAR MAIL OR OVERNIGHT MAIL; THE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER OR REVIEW ANY STATEMENTS NOT SERVED ON THE OTHER PARTY, AND DEFENDANTS MUST FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE OTHER PARTY HAS SEEN THE STATEMENT. THE COURT DOES NOT ANTICIPATE REQUIRING A FURTHER HEARING. THE MATTERS WILL BE DEEMED SUBMITTED ON MARCH 11, 2019. NO COURT APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED ON MAR-11-2019.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUZMAN, SYLVIA E CCSF'S TAX COLLECTOR REPRESENTATIVE WAIVED ANY ENTITLEMENT TO RECOVER BY EMAIL OF 1/26/2016. DEFENDANT RELIED ON THAT REPRESENTATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, SYLVIA E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX/COLLECTORS IS PRESENT SARAH HEYWORTH COLLECTION AGENT. DEFENDANT SYLVIA GUZMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JAN-24-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHALL BE PREPARED AT THE HEARING TO ADDRESS (1) WHETHER IT HAS WAIVED ITS RIGHT TO PAYMENT BY REPRESENTING TO DEFENDANT IN BILLING STATEMENTS THAT SHE OWNS NOTHING; AND (2) WHETHER AB72 OF THE 2015-2016 LEGISLATIVE SESSION PREVENTS PLAINTIFF FROM SEEKING FURTHER PAYMENT FROM DEFENDANT (3)WHETHER BLUE CROSS IS A NECESSARY PARTY.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE:CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
